page: Google Cloud Platform a2-ultragpu-2g is an accelerator-optimized server configured with two NVIDIA A100 Ampere GPUs providing a total of 160 GB of VRAM. The system features an Intel Xeon x86_64 processor with 24 dedicated vCPUs (12 physical cores) operating at 2.2 GHz, supported by 340.0 GB of system memory. Local storage consists of a 750 GB NVMe SSD.

Benchmark data indicates a clear trade-off between CPU and GPU-accelerated workloads. Single-core CPU performance is categorized as weak, falling in the bottom 25% for stress-ng and Geekbench tests. Multi-core CPU performance and memory bandwidth fall into the average tier. Conversely, the server demonstrates top-tier performance in LLM inference benchmarks, achieving top 10% speeds for prompt processing and text generation across 7B and 70B parameter models.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, this server represents a high-density resource allocation where the premium is driven by the dual A100 GPUs and large memory capacity rather than raw CPU compute. It is designed for workloads that offload processing to the GPU, such as large language model inference, deep learning training, and data science pipelines, while general-purpose single-threaded tasks are less cost-effective.
description: Google Cloud Platform a2-ultragpu-2g is an accelerator-optimized server featuring two NVIDIA A100 Ampere GPUs with 160 GB of total VRAM, 24 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 340.0 GB of RAM, and a 750 GB local NVMe SSD. While single-core CPU benchmarks place this server in the bottom 25%, its multi-core performance and memory bandwidth are average. The server excels in GPU-driven workloads, delivering top-tier, top 10% benchmark results for LLM inference prompt processing and text generation across 7B and 70B models. This hardware profile is optimized for deep learning, large language model inference, and data science workloads where processing is offloaded to the GPUs, making it a specialized, high-density accelerator platform.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform a2-ultragpu-2g is an accelerator-optimized server with 2 NVIDIA A100 GPUs, 24 vCPUs, 340GB RAM, and a 750GB NVMe SSD, delivering top-tier LLM inference performance.

tagline: An accelerator-optimized platform featuring dual NVIDIA A100 GPUs and 340 GB of RAM for high-throughput language model inference.
bullet_points: Dual NVIDIA A100 Ampere GPUs with 160 GB total VRAM
24 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs and 340 GB of system memory
Top-tier benchmark performance for 7B and 70B LLM inference
Suited for deep learning, data science, and model serving
